programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster meets fellow enthusiasts Tommy and Tuppence at a nursing home, where the ramblings of an elderly resident prompt them to join forces and investigate the unsolved mystery of a murdered child. The trail leads to the Norfolk village of Farrell St Edmund, a community harbouring sinister secrets and tales of heartbreak. Geraldine McEwan heads an all-star cast, including Greta Scacchi, Anthony Andrews, Charles Dance, June Whitfield and Claire Bloom

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff uses his hospital radio show to talk about how he has forgiven Yasmeen and wants to help her. Abi moves into No 13, and when Adam spots Sinead's cardigan poking out of his bag, Daniel is embarrassed

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Yasmeen phones Geoff with a surprising message, and Adam suspects that Gary has killed Rick. Nicky informs Daniel they could do more than talk for the money he's paying her

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Yasmeen collapses on the first day of her trial, and Gary is concerned by Brian's interest in Beacon Woods because of a potential stash of Roman coins. Meanwhile, Ed worries that Aggie is working far too hard at the hospital

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A blizzard forces the sleuthing spinster to spend a night in isolated Sittaford House, situated on a Devon moor. Without explanation, the building's owner, up-and-coming politician Clive Trevelyan, decides to spend the evening in a local hotel - only for a Ouija board to predict his murder. Mystery drama with an all-star cast, including Geraldine McEwan, Robert Hardy, Matthew Kelly, Patricia Hodge and Mel Smith

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack returns to duty after a period of suspension, and finds himself investigating the murder of a man who had been leading a double life. In addition, he also has to deal with the baffling case of a man found dead with his right foot hacked off and replaced by a severed left foot. Drama, starring David Jason and Amanda Root

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Forest ranger Felicity Ward is blinded by mysterious lights while driving at night in the village of Cooper Hill and the next morning her car is found abandoned at the roadside, followed closely by the discovery of her body. Visiting UFO spotters in the village are convinced aliens are responsible, but as Barnaby and Nelson try to get to the truth, they unearth suspicions, betrayals and long-buried secrets along the way. Michelle Collins, Steve Evets, Alison Steadman, Steve Oram and Pip Torrens guest star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of Midsomer resident and biscuit factory boss Eric Calder leads Barnaby and Nelson to Copenhagen. The pair join forces with local detectives Birgitte Poulsen and Anna Degn in the hunt for the killer, and during the course of their investigation they discover the businessman had numerous links to the capital. Anglo-Danish collaboration originally shown to mark Midsomer's 100th episode, guest starring Ann Eleonora Jorgensen (The Killing), Birgitte Hjort Sorensen (Borgen), Sanjeev Bhaskar and Joanna Scanlan, alongside Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The killing of a postman, whose doorstep deliveries often included more than just letters, rocks the idyllic rural hamlet of Goodman's Land and sends Barnaby on the trail of a murderer with vengeance in mind - if Sgt Troy can keep his eyes off the attractive village policewoman long enough to follow the clues. Murder mystery, guest starring Robert Glenister, with John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Gillian Kearney

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An arson attack on a Turkish social club leaves 17 people dead and Brooks, Devlin and Chandler fearing the crime was racially motivated. They uncover a trail of false identities, but face opposition from a respected barrister when they need to remove a key piece of evidence from a suspect's leg. Meanwhile, Steel is forced to confront one of his oldest friends. Guest starring Charles Kay, with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A respected gynaecologist is accused of sexually assaulting a patient during a routine examination, but Brooks, Devlin and Chandler struggle to find any firm evidence and the team becomes divided. Crown Prosecutor Alesha Phillips refuses to accept defeat and takes on formidable defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone. Crime drama, guest starring Derek Riddell and Lesley Manville, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber, Harriet Walter and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A tragic communication error between officers leaves gay police constable Nick Bentley caught in the crossfire of armed drug dealers, with no back-up. Brooks and Devlin follow a lead to a small-time dealer who claims to have seen a second policeman standing nearby, doing nothing while his partner bled to death. The story shocks the detectives and their boss Chandler as they investigate a homophobic religious group at the centre of the incident involving members of their own force. Crime drama, starring Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Harriet Walter

programme.title: Barging Round Britain with John Sergeant
programme.desc: The broadcaster leaves central Manchester, heading east along the Rochdale Canal. Not long into his journey, John finds himself struggling to contend with 19th-century technology at a cotton works. Further up the canal, he helps out members of an conservation group clearing the waterway of dumped supermarket trollies. After passing into West Yorkshire, it's on to Hebden Bridge, famous for the hard-wearing material corduroy, before John tries his hand at clog-making in one of Britain's few remaining factories dedicated to the craft

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: The doctor and his wife hire a servant, unaware that the lady in question is his long-lost mother

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are trained to act as bodyguards to a Middle Eastern president who is preparing to sign an important peace treaty. As their paths cross, the CI5 operatives learn the would-be killers have some useful inside information and share more in common with them than they may have imagined

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Recently released criminal Eddie Boyse becomes prime suspect in an assault case - and Regan believes he is guilty. Unfortunately for the officer, Boyse has the perfect alibi - he was in Regan's company when the crime was committed. Drama, starring John Thaw, with Dennis Waterman and Del Henney

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar joins forces with a glamorous female agent in order to help liberate John Spring, a double agent whom the Russians believe to be working for them. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Gisburne is left in charge of Nottingham by the Sheriff and hires a group of Flemish mercenaries to hunt down the outlaws

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo investigate when Harriet's father is the victim of a cunning burglar who sneaks in undetected and steals a priceless jade collection. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's latest money-making idea involves a racing scam with an imaginary office. He hires a postal address and uses three public telephone boxes, and Terry has to make sure they are kept free. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle's country holiday with their latest girlfriends spirals into chaos when they are held hostage in a farmhouse by two gunmen who have just botched a robbery. Adventure, with Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is forced to impose himself on an old girlfriend whose flat is conveniently near a bank that intelligence has revealed is to be raided. Once in position, he and Carter try to pinpoint a radio transmitter that is being used to coordinate the movements of the robbers. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: With the knockout stages firmly in their sights, England rounded off Pool C at the 2003 Rugby World Cup against Uruguay. After a worrying build up to the fixture, in which England had escaped with just a fine for momentarily having 16 players on the pitch in their previous game against Samoa, coach Clive Woodward will have been relieved to get back to the matter in hand at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane. Presented by Jim Rosenthal alongside Nigel Melville and Will Carling in the studio and commentary from Nigel Starmer-Smith and Steve Smith

programme.title: The Blues Brothers (1980)
programme.desc: Two criminal brothers discover the orphanage where they were raised faces closure unless the nuns who run it can pay their tax bill, so the pair embark on an urgent mission to revive their old blues band to raise the money needed. Comedy, starring John Belushi, Dan Aykroyd, Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Ray Charles, Cab Calloway, Carrie Fisher, John Candy and John Lee Hooker

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Glover and Norman are smitten by the charms of a new doctor, but Thorpe is initially hostile towards his colleague simply because she is young, female and attractive. Figgis warns the medic of his fellow patients' amorous intentions in a cryptic manner, but when Thorpe sees the error of his ways and offers an apology for his behaviour, she wrongly assumes he is her secret admirer. Hospital comedy, starring James Bolam and Richard Wilson

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. While she is admitted to a sanatorium to prevent a nervous breakdown, Templar works on the premise that her spouse may indeed still be alive. Roger Moore and Sylvia Syms star

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robin is bewitched by evil sorceress Lilith, who sends him on a mission to steal the magical silver arrow from Herne's cave. Michael Praed stars

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Jim reveals his gentler side when Harriet's friend is found murdered, but the case is clouded when the victim's vengeful father gets in the way. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Members of the local travelling community are blamed when a car-dealer friend of Arthur's has the frighteners put on him. However, they soon prove useful allies when those actually responsible are revealed. Comedy drama, guest starring Jimmy Nail and June Whitfield

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: England and Wales met for only the second time at a Rugby World Cup as they locked horns in the quarter-finals of the 2003 tournament in Brisbane. With four wins from four in the pool stages, England were favourites to progress, but Steve Hanson's Wales had issued a statement of intent by running the All Blacks close in their previous match. What transpired at the Suncorp Stadium was knockout rugby of the highest calibre, illuminated by the sublime talents of Shane Williams and Jason Robinson. Presented by Jim Rosenthal with Will Carling, Ieuan Evans and Francois Pienaar in the studio, with commentary from John Taylor and Steve Smith

programme.title: Jaws 2 (1978)
programme.desc: The seaside resort of Amity is terrorised once again by a man-eating great white shark. While police chief Brody struggles to alert the townsfolk to the magnitude of the danger, a group of teenagers - including Brody's two sons - is adrift at sea in waters hunted by the shark. Thriller sequel, starring Roy Scheider, Lorraine Gary and Murray Hamilton

programme.title: Escape to Victory (1981)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: France v England. Jim Rosenthal presents a chance to see the semi-final at Stadium Australia in Sydney, as the sides battled it out for the right to face the hosts in the final. England went into the match as favourites and looked to fly-half Jonny Wilkinson for inspiration, and his form off the kicking tee proved to be crucial. The French thrashed Ireland in the quarter-finals to reach the last four, but torrential rain in Sydney was to prove a key factor in the match, with Sir Clive Woodward's men coping much better with the conditions. With analysis from Austin Healey, Will Carling and Francois Pienaar, and commentary by John Taylor and Steve Smith

programme.title: Gran Torino (2008)
programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: England and Wales met for only the second time at a Rugby World Cup as they locked horns in the quarter-finals of the 2003 tournament in Brisbane. With four wins from four in the pool stages, England were favourites to progress, but Steve Hanson's Wales had issued a statement of intent by running the All Blacks close in their previous match. What transpired at the Suncorp Stadium was knockout rugby of the highest calibre, illuminated by the sublime talents of Shane Williams and Jason Robinson. Presented by Jim Rosenthal with Will Carling, Ieuan Evans and Francois Pienaar in the studio, with commentary from John Taylor and Steve Smith

programme.title: Jaws 2 (1978)
programme.desc: The seaside resort of Amity is terrorised once again by a man-eating great white shark. While police chief Brody struggles to alert the townsfolk to the magnitude of the danger, a group of teenagers - including Brody's two sons - is adrift at sea in waters hunted by the shark. Thriller sequel, starring Roy Scheider, Lorraine Gary and Murray Hamilton

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: France v England. Jim Rosenthal presents a chance to see the semi-final at Stadium Australia in Sydney, as the sides battled it out for the right to face the hosts in the final. England went into the match as favourites and looked to fly-half Jonny Wilkinson for inspiration, and his form off the kicking tee proved to be crucial. The French thrashed Ireland in the quarter-finals to reach the last four, but torrential rain in Sydney was to prove a key factor in the match, with Sir Clive Woodward's men coping much better with the conditions. With analysis from Austin Healey, Will Carling and Francois Pienaar, and commentary by John Taylor and Steve Smith

programme.title: Gran Torino (2008)
programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang

Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa gets his driving licence back to woo a beautiful new resident at the nursing home. Unfortunately he is not her only suitor, and she soon proves unworthy of his affection. With the guest voice of Olympia Dukakis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer reminisces about how he gave up his dreams of being a musician so that Marge could go to Springfield University. After she became attracted to one of her professors, Homer started channelling his emotions into music and formed America's first grunge band, Sadgasm

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mr Burns angers the residents of Springfield with a plot to block out the sun's light, which would force the town to use the electricity generated by his power plant. The townsfolk plan to fight back, but one mysterious person goes too far and shoots the greedy entrepreneur. Featuring the guest voice of salsa musician Tito Puente

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart befriends an ageing Western movie star who is driven to take one drink too many by the prospect of appearing on Krusty's TV show. Featuring the guest voice of Dennis Weaver

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Members of the family appear as characters in a trilogy of classical stories. Bart plays Hamlet trying to avenge his father's death, Lisa pits the French against the English as Joan of Arc, and Homer acts the part of Ulysses in the Odyssey

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the White Lodge Hotel in Filey, North Yorkshire, where hosts James and Kim Hodgson hope their love of high standards will win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Amanda Lucia-Charley and her friend Alan Talbot invite the other hoteliers to sample the delights of Crystals on the Prom in Blackpool, where Alan introduces his alter-ego Ada

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Old Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire, where pair Mark and Jean Lee hope their plain and simple pub B&B will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest ends at glamping site Camp Katur in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, where Kerry Roy and Nicola Wilding hope to wow their guests with their unique 'geodomes' and see-through pods

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the contest arrives, and while Amanda Lucia-Charley and Alan Talbot receive harsh criticism of their breakfast, Mark and Jean Lee's decor receives scathing reviews

programme.title: Jimmy's Forest
programme.desc: A thick layer of snow covers the Norfolk wood as winter arrives, helping Jimmy Doherty trace the prints of birds and animals using it as their home. He also learns about how insects survive the season's harsh conditions, watches 80,000 rooks take to the sky, builds a Yukon firepit and discovers evidence that an unwelcome predator is residing in the forest

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: North Yorkshire couple Carol and Steve are searching for a holiday home in Oliva, eastern Spain, so Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin is on the Canary Island of Tenerife helping husband and wife Teresa and Robin find their dream holiday home that they hope to retire to in the future. Having visited the island six times in the last few years, it's quickly become their favourite place. With five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, will they find what they're looking for?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows Matt and Sophie White from Sussex as they build a giant family house of fun for themselves and their children. Going against the norm of designing a serious and practical home, the couple's property features a revolving bookcase door, secret dens, hiding places and a fireman's pole. Matt uses a steel frame system to allow them to change the layout of the property, and other changes include amending the window shapes and sizes, and adding a half floor to create a James Bond room

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Skeletons of the Mary Rose: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Scientists and historians use isotope and DNA analysis to identify the crew of Henry VIII's flagship, which sank off the coast of Portsmouth in 1545. With the help of Mary Rose Trust curator Alex Hildred, the programme uncovers evidence that many of the sailors were of African origin, and traces surviving descendants of the only two members of the crew who can be identified by name. Plus, the little-known story of a 16th-century Guinean free-diver who retrieved several treasures from the wreck

programme.title: How to Build
programme.desc: Documentary charting the step-by-step process of the construction of an electric London taxi, from the pieces of aluminium chassis to the £60,000 power train eco-cab, with access-all-areas footage of each stage of the 28-hour production process

programme.title: The Post (2017)
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk

programme.title: Sicario (2015)
programme.desc: An FBI agent is recruited to join an elite government task force based on the border between the US and Mexico, charged with preventing drugs being smuggled into the country. The team is sent on a secret mission, and the new recruit is forced to question everything she believes in order to survive. Crime drama, starring Emily Blunt, Josh Brolin and Benicio Del Toro

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris explores five countries that were part of Yugoslavia, which had an extensive state-run railway network before its break-up in the 1990s and the Balkan Wars of Independence that followed. From Slovenia, Chris heads east along an old Austro-Hungarian railway that was once used by the Orient Express, pays a visit to a very unusual railway-related battlefield in Bosnia and rides on one of the world's great mountain railways on his way to the Serbian capital Belgrade before finishing his journey in Montenegro

programme.title: Then & Now
programme.desc: The Mersey is one of Britain's most magnificent rivers, running 70 miles from Stockport to the Irish Sea. This documentary reveals how the waterway has been at the heart of British shipbuilding for more than 180 years, from the first aircraft carrier HMS Ark Royal to the latest, HMS Prince of Wales. It has also been important for business, with 40 per cent of all world trade coming through Liverpool's docks in the 19th century, and played a key role in the Allied victory during the Second World War

programme.title: The Curse of King Tut
programme.desc: The 1922 discovery of Tutankhamun's tomb in Egypt's Valley of Kings remains one of the greatest archaeological finds of all time. But when Howard Carter broke through the sealed entrance to reveal thousands of priceless artefacts and the teenage body of the boy king, rumours of the Pharaoh's revenge consumed the media. And when Carter's benefactor Lord Carnarvon suddenly died, the belief that a deadly curse had been unleashed ran like wildfire. This documentary looks back at Carter and Carnarvon's discovery, and explores the truth behind the stories of the curse

programme.title: Concorde: 120 Seconds to Disaster - 20 Years On
programme.desc: The incident from July 2000 when an Air France Concorde crashed shortly after take-off from Charles de Gaulle Airport. All 109 passengers and crew members on board were killed, as well as at least four people on the ground. The entire world reeled in shock as in 24 years of commercial flight, Concorde had an unblemished record and was considered to be one of the safest passenger planes in history. This documentary re-examines the causes of the incident, as revealed by French and British air crash investigators

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: Cameras follow some of the people who have seen their houses and lives destroyed by the terrifying phenomenon of sinkholes

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Bill Nighy narrates a trip through Wales' highest peaks and deepest valleys. Starting in Pwllheli in the north west, the route heads along the lines that were built during the slate industry's heyday. At Porthmadog, the journey briefly switches to the reconstructed steam trains of the Welsh Highland National Heritage Railway to Minffordd station. Nearby is the village of Portmeirion, famous for its role in the classic TV series The Prisoner. Rejoining the Cambrian Line, local farmers reveal what the railway means to them, before the route takes in the seaside resort of Aberdovey

programme.title: World's Most Pampered Pets
programme.desc: Documentary looking for the animal with the most lavish lifestyle and revealing why some owners spend as much money on their pets as they do on themselves. American reality TV star Aubrey O'Day takes her pampered pooches for an extreme makeover, including purple highlights for one and a pink Mohican for another, while Louise Harris from Essex auditions Britain's best-looking 'diva dogs' for a new fashion line. Also featured are the world's most expensive pet accessories and the sad story of Kalu the chimp - who missed out on an inheritance of £40million when its owner revealed she had lost her entire fortune

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century artist Peter Paul Rubens, who enjoyed an active and eventful career. He was regarded as the chief exponent of the Baroque style, merging the grace of the Italian High Renaissance with the realism and landscapes of the northern tradition, and was perhaps best known for painting voluptuous female nudes within large-scale mythological allegories

programme.desc: At the moment the 2020 Olympic Games were supposed to be starting in Tokyo, the presenters limber up to see if tech can put them on a par with elite athletes from four different events. Ortis Deley heads to the home of the next generation of British sport, Loughborough University, to take on a female weightlifter with the help of robotics. Plus, Craig Charles teams up with the fastest drone pilots in the country to try to outpace a group of medal-winning sprinters in a 4x100 metre relay

programme.title: Celeb 5 Go Caravanning: Back on the Road
programme.desc: Revisiting the caravanning adventures of actors Colin Baker, Sherrie Hewson and Todd Carty, radio DJ Tony Blackburn and pop legend Sonia as they enjoy the trials and tribulations of a caravanning road trip. In an extended edit of the first episode, Colin, Sherrie, Todd and Tony meet in the Lancashire resort of Morecambe where they set eyes on their caravans for the first time. After a quick selfie together at the statue of Eric Morecambe, they set off for Kendal to pick up Sonia. However, plans go awry thanks to a puncture. They arrive on their first campsite in Keswick, faced with the unenviable task of reversing the caravans onto their pitches, before bedding down for their first night

programme.title: QE2: The World's Most Luxurious Hotel
programme.desc: Life aboard the most famous ocean liner in the world, now a floating hotel in Dubai. Bigger than Titanic, she transported rock stars and royalty and sailed over six million miles, circumnavigating the globe 25 times before being retired. With more than 100 five-star hotels, competition in the Dubai hotel market is fierce and though millions have already been spent on her refurbishment, she's still only 40 per cent complete. In this episode, the first VIP guests are due to check in and top chef Dino and his team have a big event planned - a traditional Burns night supper for 200 guests

programme.title: Peter Kay Comedy Genius: In His Own Words

programme.desc: The Fat Controller decides it is time Scruff was repainted, but the engine does not think he will like his new look

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Pontypandy Fire Station is opened to the public and Norman is eager to try things out, crawling under safety tape and getting into the driving seat of a fire engine. However, his inquisitive nature and desire for excitement lead to danger when he climbs onto the roof to get closer to Tom and his helicopter

programme.title: Shane the Chef
programme.desc: Shane agrees to referee a football match, but the footballers cannot tell which team is which

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly and her parents try to impress Snobby King and Queen Marigold with help from the elf band

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Goodway wishes that she could relax in the sun like a frog, the new wishing well in the park turns her into a frog

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The piglet and her brother George realise they have shadows and cannot escape from them

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The piglet and her playgroup friends dress up as countries from around the world

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy teaches Peppa and George a game to play indoors while they wait for the rain to stop

programme.title: Butterbean's Cafe
programme.desc: Butterbean offers to babysit a toddler for the day, but it turns out to be harder than she thought

programme.title: Little Princess
programme.desc: Little Princess is delighted when a rainbow appears over the castle and she is determined to see if there is gold at the end of it

programme.title: Nella the Princess Knight
programme.desc: Trinket and Nella wonder if they should be friends when they want to do different things

programme.title: Wissper
programme.desc: Frank and Betty's baby flamingo gets stuck up a tree which is teetering on the edge of a cliff and about to fall into a lake

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Pirata solves the mystery of a strange light in the water - and restores the reputation of an old pirate

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Zeta disguises herself as a zahracorn to break into Princess Adara's palace and steal the shooting stardust - but the disguise gets out of control

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: The tiny aliens find themselves investigating a rock pool. Unfortunately for Boomer, he gets a little too close for comfort to a barnacle

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is excited to learn that Mummy Rabbit is pregnant

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro Pony pretends to be a cowboy and tells stories in a camp he has set up in the garden

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick decides he wants to be a horse after SpongeBob reads him a story called You Can Be Anything

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate
programme.desc: Ryan completes a mix of flavourful challenges to meet his playdate

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Carol finally gives birth, but Ross and Susan nearly miss out on the big event thanks to Phoebe, who locks them in a cupboard to stop them bickering. Meanwhile, Joey comes to the rescue of a pregnant woman at the hospital

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler lets slip about Ross's feelings for Rachel while the palaeontologist is on a trip to China, giving her time to decide what to do about the revelation

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel has a hard time dealing with Ross's new relationship and turns to Paolo for comfort. Monica strikes up a friendship with her brother's latest girlfriend, and Chandler has a bad experience with Joey's tailor

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes shopping with Julie and tries to keep it a secret from Rachel. Phoebe manages to unwittingly disgust everyone, while, at his day job, Joey competes with a fellow cologne salesman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang's strange neighbour Mr Heckles dies, bequeathing all his possessions to Rachel and Monica. Meanwhile, Ross and Phoebe have a disagreement about evolution

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stolen car is recovered on the M11, and the team is given advanced training in the use of a tactical battering ram. Plus, a suspect briefly goes missing at a burger bar, an officer proves his mettle in a series of drug raids, and members of the unit are forced to calm a drunken sailor

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team is forced to intervene when a man is assaulted in the street by his wife. Officers set out on the trail of one of the largest stolen car operations in Essex, and the interceptors put their vehicles to the test when the driver of a hijacked 4x4 goes off road in an attempt to lose them

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Inspector Emma Brookes races 40 miles to prevent a suicidal man throwing himself off a rooftop, while one of her colleagues chases a suspected drug dealer. Elsewhere, the Air Support Unit is called to track a fugitive car thief, and a man is caught with a van full of stolen clothes

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell presents a documentary charting the history of the world's most famous steam locomotive

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Jane McDonald & Friends
programme.desc: The hoat is joined by Blue singer and Hollyoaks star Duncan James (Ryan Knight), singer-songwriter-actress-host and Loose Women regular Michelle Gayle and Britain's Got Talent-winning musical theatre group Collabro for some classic hits and standards, and a chance to enjoy heartwarming stories that celebrate Britain's unsung heroes. As ever, the members of the audience forms an integral part of the proceedings by sharing in the host's secret surprises and participating in the fun

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Previously unseen highlights of the singer's trip in which she explored Iceland aboard the Ocean Diamond, which began life as a ferry, but now braves the freezing Arctic seas to provide passengers with breathtaking views of the country's rugged shorelines

programme.title: Anne at 70: The Best Queen We Never Had?
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life of the queen's only daughter. The programme examines her skill as a horse rider, representing Britain in three-day eventing at the 1976 Olympics on her mother's horse, as well as her support for various charities and foundations, and the incident in 1974, when she survived an attempt to kidnap her and hold her to ransom

programme.title: Diana vs the Tabloids
programme.desc: A look at the Princess of Wales' complex relationship with the press, examining the deal she made with newspaper editors after her divorce from Prince Charles where in exchange for privacy she would feed their news desks stories. However, the tabloids' obsession with Diana, and her need of them to stay relevant, would become a dangerous game. What were the events that led to one of the most tragic deaths in recent history?

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Kate Thornton narrates a selection of dust-ups with judges, live disasters and behind-the-scenes scandals from shows including The X Factor, Britain's Got Talent and Dancing on Ice. There are first-hand accounts from the stars that were there, with contributions by David and Carrie Grant, Neil Fox, Jake Quickenden, James and Ola Jordan and Jenny eclair

programme.title: Greatest Ever TV Blunders
programme.desc: Elis James introduces outtakes from popular TV shows, including classic continuity cock-ups and bungles from newer programmes

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian is called to a heifer in agony with an object embedded in her painful, swollen and infected foot, while Peter removes a huge lump from Holly the golden retriever's head. Meanwhile, two of Skeldale's favourite clients, farmers Steve and Jeanie, are concerned about their cat Spitfire, who has not been his usual feisty self

programme.title: Concorde: 120 Seconds to Disaster - 20 Years On
programme.desc: The incident from July 2000 when an Air France Concorde crashed shortly after take-off from Charles de Gaulle Airport. All 109 passengers and crew members on board were killed, as well as at least four people on the ground. The entire world reeled in shock as in 24 years of commercial flight, Concorde had an unblemished record and was considered to be one of the safest passenger planes in history. This documentary re-examines the causes of the incident, as revealed by French and British air crash investigators

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Historian Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century visionary Dutch artist Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn, who was famed for his skilful handling of light and shade in paintings portraying the human form. Born in Leiden in 1606, the eighth of nine children, his passion for art led him to an apprenticeship with a local painter, and from the time he was a 19-year-old he had a studio in Amsterdam, where he produced 75 self-portraits. Demand for his talents soon grew and success came when he was commissioned to paint The Anatomy Lesson of Dr Tulp

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The Tall Stranger (1957)
programme.desc: A Union soldier struggles to recover from a violent encounter with a gang of lawless cattle rustlers, but his recuperation is cut short as he works to ensure the safety of a group of Confederate homesteaders journeying north at the end of the Civil War. Western based on a novel by Louis L'Amour, starring Joel McCrea, Virginia Mayo, Michael Ansara and Michael Pate

programme.title: Pursued (1947)
programme.desc: A brooding cowboy yearns to find peace, but his life seems to follow a tragic path because of the actions and hatred of a mysterious one-armed stranger and a forgotten incident from his childhood. Western, starring Robert Mitchum, Teresa Wright, Dean Jagger, Judith Anderson, Alan Hale and John Rodney

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew

programme.title: Warcraft (2016)
programme.desc: A kingdom stands on the brink of war when it is invaded by a vast horde of creatures who have travelled through a portal from their dying world. As dark magic works its influence on the world, two leaders from either side are set on a collision course with each other as they strive to protect their people. Fantasy adventure based on the best-selling computer game, starring Travis Fimmel, Paula Patton and Ben Foster

programme.title: Sweet Country (2017)
programme.desc: An aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defence and goes on the run as a posse gathers to hunt him down. Australian period drama, starring Hamilton Morris, Bryan Brown and Sam Neill

programme.title: The Business (2005)
programme.desc: A criminal flees London in the 1980s to start a new life on the Costa del Sol. He is soon drawn into the inner circle of a British gangster living in exile, but his relationship with a psychotic crook's girlfriend threatens to bring his criminal career to an abrupt end. Crime drama, starring Danny Dyer, Tamer Hassan and Geoff Bell

programme.title: Straightheads (2007)
programme.desc: A woman and her lover are attacked by a gang while driving down a remote country road, an experience that leaves them traumatised. Later returning to the area in the wake of her father's death, she encounters one of her attackers by chance and sees the opportunity to take revenge. Thriller, starring Gillian Anderson and Danny Dyer

programme.title: Warlock (1959)
programme.desc: A ruthless vigilante is recruited as a sheriff to clean up the streets of a crime-ridden town, but his strong-arm tactics soon antagonise the townsfolk. When a woman turns up and accuses the lawman of murdering her fiance, the residents rally to her cause with the help of a rival gunslinger. Western, starring Henry Fonda, Richard Widmark, Anthony Quinn, DeForest Kelley and Dorothy Malone

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie (1967)
programme.desc: A naive woman leaves her rural roots behind to seek fortune and romance in 1920s New York. She finds work as a secretary to a business tycoon, but he happens to be madly in love with her friend. However, before long she is wooed instead by a smitten salesman. Meanwhile, back at her boarding house, she stumbles across a shocking criminal enterprise involving the landlady. Musical comedy, with Julie Andrews, James Fox and Mary Tyler Moore

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn

programme.title: Lucy (2014)
programme.desc: A courier is kidnapped and forced to become a drug mule. When she is exposed to the experimental chemicals she is smuggling, it boosts her intelligence and reflexes to superhuman levels. She uses her newfound abilities to get revenge on her captors, but as the process continues, she evolves into something more than human. Sci-fi thriller, starring Scarlett Johansson and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Sabotage (2014)
programme.desc: The members of an elite Drug Enforcement Administration team secretly keep the millions of dollars they find during the raid. When they are killed off one by one, the leader becomes convinced one of his men is getting rid of the others to keep all the money, and sets out to expose the murderer. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Elle (2016)
programme.desc: After being raped in her home by a masked assailant, Michèle Leblanc does not go to the police as she has far too many other things to concern herself with to put her life on hold. But when Michèle starts getting text messages from the rapist describing her clothing and whereabouts, she arms herself with pepper spray and a small axe, considering all the men in her life a possible suspect. Paul Verhoeven's thriller, starring Isabelle Huppert. In French

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie (1998)
programme.desc: Tommy tries to return his new brother to the baby shop, helped by Angelica, Chuckie, Phil and Lil - but the friends become lost in dense woodlands en route, turning their expedition into a scary and exciting journey of discovery. Animated comedy based on the TV series, with the voices of Elizabeth Daily, Christine Cavanaugh, Kath Soucie, Whoopi Goldberg and Busta Rhymes

programme.title: Epic (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into a forest that her scientist father believes is home to a race of miniature people. She stumbles on the tiny creatures and is shrunk down to their size so she can carry out a quest to save their new queen from an invading army. Animated adventure, with the voices of Amanda Seyfried, Josh Hutcherson, Colin Farrell and Christoph Waltz

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Chaos (2005)
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his inexperienced new partner are assigned to investigate a bank heist. At first sight, no money appears to have been stolen. However, it eventually emerges the criminal mastermind behind the robbery had a more complex and profitable scheme in mind - and a possible connection to the detective on his trail. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Ryan Phillippe and Wesley Snipes

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: Horns (2013)
programme.desc: A man who has become an outcast after being accused of murdering his own girlfriend wakes up one morning to find he has grown horns. He discovers he now has the power to compel people to confess their sins or act on their darkest desires, and uses his supernatural gifts to expose the real killer. Horror based on Joe Hill's novel, starring Daniel Radcliffe and Juno Temple

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After discovering The Rocky Horror Picture Show, Barry decides to throw a Halloween party for the ages, no matter what Erica says

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find they are fakes and they cannot get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan as himself

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lisa and Jesue begin the contest in this episode from Cambridge and Peterborough, as they compete against bickering partners Paul and Gareth, and posh millennials Georgie and Alex

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Jack plans a haunting, horror-themed wedding, while his bride-to-be Becka dreams of a traditional Scottish affair. As Jack recruits the Grim Reaper and covers Becka's wedding dress in fake blood, he hopes his eerie marital concept will prove a screaming success and not a fright night disaster

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Sean reveals that Andrew made inappropriate jokes and insults about Cheryl in front of the boys, but Andrew claims he has no memory of such things

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe and Ryder sell some of Mel's old belongings, they accidentally dispose of a very personal item that she wants to get back. Desperate to reclaim it, Mel and Joe turn to crime to achieve their aims. Elsewhere, Lennox discovers that her new pen pal wants to meet her in person. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct embarks on its fifth annual Halloween Heist and, as usual, everybody has a plan and no one is safe. Relationships and friendships are tested in the competition to win a spectacular championship belt and the title 'Amazing Human Slash Genius' by midnight, leaving all the members of the squad pitted against one another

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: To track down an infamous arms dealer, Peralta and Jeffords go undercover at an illegal gambling club, but when Captain Holt tries to coach them in the art of poker, his addiction resurfaces. Boyle buys a food truck that was formerly the site of a brutal double murder, to the horror of his only investor in the project, Santiago. Hitchcock and Scully have an unusual challenge for Dia. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The Cooper kids try to come up with ways to resolve a family feud when Meemaw refuses to give George Sr her secret brisket recipe. US comedy, with Iain Armitage, Lance Barber and Annie Potts, and narrated by Jim Parsons (adult Sheldon in The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: In an attempt to bond with Sheldon, George Sr takes the boys on a road trip to see the Space Shuttle launch. Meanwhile, Mary, Missy and Meemaw have a girls' weekend at the salon. Narrated by Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: After winning a 10-course dining experience in a raffle, Mel decides to join an exercise boot camp to lose some weight before she gorges on the gourmet meal - and she even manages to persuade Joe to teach the class. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander try to sell their web series. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel receives some bad publicity due to Joe when he shares too much with the press at a function, while Ryder decides to ask Stella out on a date, and Lennox and Zander make a big decision about their future

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta prepares for an all-night interrogation in the hope of securing a confession from a stubborn suspect. However, when Captain Holt sacrifices an evening at the opera to stay behind at the precinct and help, the two officers clash over how to make the man talk. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a string of arson attacks that are connected to Santiago's favourite crossword puzzle author. Gina helps Holt improve his Commissioner candidate presentation, while Jeffords, Diaz, Hitchcock and Scully argue over who deserves to get a new detective car

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon is bullied by an unlikely character, Mary and George disagree on how to handle the situation, contemplating whether they should their son employ self-defence techniques. Undeterred, he tries his hand at jiu-jitsu and even covers himself in bubble-wrap for protection

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary bans Sheldon from reading a comic book that she considers to be too mature for him, the youngster decides it's time to stop living under his mother's thumb

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Another look back at Hannah Ashworth's battle with anorexia. Hannah tries to erase the past few weeks with a dramatic new look

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As the end of the experiment and the renewal of the wedding vows approaches, the couples re-evaluate their feelings. Andrew's behaviour has pushed him and Cheryl to breaking point, while Jesse opens up to Michelle

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: The Good Place
programme.desc: Bad Place demon Trevor turns up on Earth, determined to wreck Michael's plans by joining Chidi's academic study and annoying the gang into breaking up. Adam Scott guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Adrian Pimento shows up unexpectedly to seek Jake and Charles' help after claiming someone is trying to kill him. The rest of the squad endures a Workplace Conflict seminar

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Spike roars back into Sunnydale in a bid to mend his broken heart - but hitting the bottle and attempting to force Willow into bewitching Drusilla fails to solve anything. Meanwhile, Buffy feels pressured into moving away and turns to Angel for advice. Sarah Michelle Gellar stars

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Cordelia decides that all her problems are the fault of Buffy, and wishes that the slayer had never come to Sunnydale. However, new student Anya is really a vengeance demon with the power to grant her wish. Cordelia is left trapped in a nightmarish alternative world where the town is overrun by vampires - including undead versions of Willow and Xander

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: To help Morty and Summer deal with their parents' divorce, Rick takes them on an adventure to a Mad Max-style universe where he attempts to steal a green crystal from a group of scavengers

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: Tyrion Lannister learns the true meaning of 'winter is coming'. Blade tries to slice his way into infomercials. Inside Out Boy goes to college, and the Robot Chicken writers show what happens when Halloween meets Home Alone

programme.title: The Jellies!
programme.desc: Mervin Collins decides to run for mayor against current Mayor Leonard Jenkins

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: After the mysterious death of one of the lunch ladies at school, Summer becomes terrified by the possibility of a vampire attack. Rick encourages Beth and Jerry to sort out the problems in their relationship by undergoing off-planet therapy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Good Place

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
